title: Queen lifecycle tools behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: added backward-compatible aliasing between prompt_building and prompt_independent in QueenPhaseState
ensures legacy callers/tests that still set prompt_building remain compatible with current prompt_independent flow

risk_signals.evidence: mixed caller population still references prompt_building while newer flow uses prompt_independent
risk_signals.impact: without aliasing, phase prompt can be empty or stale in legacy call paths

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/tests/test_create_colony_tool.py core/tests/test_run_parallel_workers_tool.py core/tests/test_queen_memory.py -q
uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k "execution or colony or queen" -q
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if backward compatibility and lifecycle test bundles are green
